title: No Grass
description: 🧨 Stepping on Grass now instantly EXPLODES!
body:
## <center>What if touching grass was... _realistic_?</center>
Welcome to **No Grass**! A datapack that will _instantly_ explode the player when they touch variants of Grass, because we **all** know that's what happens when gamers go _outside_! Players explode when standing on a **Grass Block**, **Dirt Path**, **Podzol**, or **Mycelium**. Maybe Crimson and Warped Nylium should explode too? Anyway, if you want a challenge, oh boy, this is a chaotic pick.

**<center>DO NOT PLAY THIS ON WORLDS YOU DON'T WANT TO BLOW UP!!</center>**
**<center>YOU WILL BLOW UP A LOT!!</center>**

![---](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91719412cad6d51dea2a9e6d8c453829c2fafaf3.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KB24ORM2TOw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<center>wow, that was such an awesome trailer!</center>

![---](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91719412cad6d51dea2a9e6d8c453829c2fafaf3.png)

- If Minecraft decides to not load the datapack, run `/datapack enable "file/No Grass`...something...`.zip"`. This is usually because you didn't turn on the datapack after adding it (i think).

- **This absolutely works in multiplayer**, and it's **hilarious** too! I'd greatly recommend this as a goofy challenge.

- To reset the Death Counter, just run the command, `/function nograss:reset`. This will reset the death count for all players! Just, don't tell your friends about this...

![---](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91719412cad6d51dea2a9e6d8c453829c2fafaf3.png)

This datapack **currently only supports 1.21.x** (as of testing), but **I will add support for other versions** (planning on supporting **1.16+**).
